title: docker server vars
description: docker server vars that can be set

DOCKER_VERSION.description: Specific version of docker to install. Can be a numeric version or an alias.

LIBSCRIPT_GLOBAL_INSTALL_METHOD.description: Global override for how software should be installed across all systems (e.g. system package manager vs downloaded binaries/from-source).

LIBSCRIPT_WINDOWS_PKG_MGR.description: Global package manager override for Windows targets (e.g. winget, choco).

DOCKER_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install DOCKER. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.
